summary: Completed frontend testing of new apartment detail page feature. All 11 features tested and working correctly: navigation from apartment cards, detail page content display (title, price, bedrooms, bathrooms, sqm, description, amenities), back button navigation, send inquiry button, call button, 404 error page for non-existent apartments, and language switcher functionality on detail page.
seed_data_creation: Uses existing seeded apartments apt-001 through apt-008
context_for_next_testing_agent: Apartment detail page feature fully tested. All navigation paths working: card click, view details button click, back button, send inquiry, call button. Language switcher toggles DE/EN correctly on detail page. 404 error handling works for non-existent apartment IDs. All data-testid attributes properly implemented.
